endpoints.name: GET /accounts
endpoints.description: List hosted accounts associated with this AdSense account by ad client id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}
endpoints.description: Get information about the selected associated AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/adclients
endpoints.description: List all hosted ad clients in the specified hosted account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}
endpoints.description: Get information about one of the ad clients in the specified publisher's AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits
endpoints.description: List all ad units in the specified publisher's AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits
endpoints.description: Insert the supplied ad unit into the specified publisher AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits
endpoints.description: Update the supplied ad unit in the specified publisher AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits
endpoints.description: Update the supplied ad unit in the specified publisher AdSense account. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits/{adUnitId}
endpoints.description: Get the specified host ad unit in this AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{ADUNITID}} with a real adunitid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits/{adUnitId}
endpoints.description: Delete the specified ad unit from the specified publisher AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{ADUNITID}} with a real adunitid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/adclients/{adClientId}/adunits/{adUnitId}/adcode
endpoints.description: Get ad code for the specified ad unit, attaching the specified host custom channels.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid. Replace {{ADUNITID}} with a real adunitid.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{accountId}/reports
endpoints.description: Generate an AdSense report based on the report request sent in the query parameters. Returns the result as JSON; to retrieve output in CSV format specify "alt=csv" as a query parameter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /adclients
endpoints.description: List all host ad clients in this AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /adclients/{adClientId}
endpoints.description: Get information about one of the ad clients in the Host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: GET /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels
endpoints.description: List all host custom channels in this AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: POST /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels
endpoints.description: Add a new custom channel to the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: PUT /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels
endpoints.description: Update a custom channel in the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels
endpoints.description: Update a custom channel in the host AdSense account. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: GET /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels/{customChannelId}
endpoints.description: Get a specific custom channel from the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{CUSTOMCHANNELID}} with a real customchannelid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /adclients/{adClientId}/customchannels/{customChannelId}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific custom channel from the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{CUSTOMCHANNELID}} with a real customchannelid.

endpoints.name: GET /adclients/{adClientId}/urlchannels
endpoints.description: List all host URL channels in the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: POST /adclients/{adClientId}/urlchannels
endpoints.description: Add a new URL channel to the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /adclients/{adClientId}/urlchannels/{urlChannelId}
endpoints.description: Delete a URL channel from the host AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ADCLIENTID}} with a real adclientid. Replace {{URLCHANNELID}} with a real urlchannelid.

endpoints.name: GET /associationsessions/start
endpoints.description: Create an association session for initiating an association with an AdSense user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /associationsessions/verify
endpoints.description: Verify an association session after the association callback returns from AdSense signup.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /reports
endpoints.description: Generate an AdSense report based on the report request sent in the query parameters. Returns the result as JSON; to retrieve output in CSV format specify "alt=csv" as a query parameter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
